nodes.label: Design Guidelines
nodes.description: Canonical design system for VENLAX Sports: light-only theme, sport colors (tennis=#10B981, cricket=#2563EB, pickleball=#F97316), typography (Outfit headings, DM Sans body), bento grid layouts, glassmorphism sticky header, flat cards with hover elevation, data-testid requirement
nodes.rationale: Archetype 2 'Performance Pro' light variant chosen to project competitive, professional feel without dark UI that could feel heavy; light mode mandated to keep content readable across devices

nodes.label: Skills Lock
nodes.description: Pinned skill versions: copywriting from sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills, frontend-design from anthropics/claude-code plugins

nodes.label: Claude Project Settings
nodes.description: Project-level Claude Code permissions: allowlisted Bash commands for API health checks and skill invocations

nodes.label: Claude Local Settings
nodes.description: Local Claude Code permissions: extensive allowlist for yarn/craco builds, Coolify MCP tools, WebSearch/WebFetch domains, git operations, Python test commands, Stitch design tools

nodes.label: Logo Generator Script
nodes.description: Python script using Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (Imagen 4) to generate 10 minimalist VENLAX logo variations via Google Generative Language API. Prompts explore wordmark styles using brand colors teal (#10B981), orange (#F97316), black

nodes.label: Auth Utils
nodes.description: JWT creation/verification (HS256, 24h access + 7d refresh), bcrypt password hashing, get_current_user/get_optional_user middleware reading httpOnly cookies or Bearer header, require_admin role check, serialize_public_user PII stripper

nodes.label: Email Service
nodes.description: aiosmtplib-based email sender with console fallback when SMTP_HOST unset. Provides typed senders: match_scheduled, score_reported, registration_confirmed, password_reset, partner_invite, league_started, playoff_qualified, OTP, schedule_released, season_open, last_spots, waitlist_open, partner_declined, generic. Includes fire-and-forget schedule() helper

nodes.label: Pydantic Models
nodes.description: All MongoDB document models: BaseDocument (_id<->id coercion), User, League (flex|round_robin, division tiers, box config), RRConfig, DoublesInvite, Team (cricket), Match (RR/flex/doubles), Standing (ELO points formula), PlayerLeague, PaymentTransaction, Challenge, Season (box_assignments), Ladder, LadderChallenge

nodes.label: Notification Dispatch
nodes.description: Capacity-milestone notification dispatcher called from league_routes. Four triggers: dispatch_season_open (new league), dispatch_filling_fast (50% capacity, push only), dispatch_last_spots (80% capacity, email+push), dispatch_waitlist_open (full, email+push). Uses pywebpush for Web Push with VAPID, cleans up 410 Gone subscriptions

nodes.label: Phase Config
nodes.description: Backend phase gating mirror of frontend platformConfig.js. Phase 1=USA Tennis+Pickleball+Stripe/USD (active), Phase 2=adds Cricket, Phase 3=India Cricket+Tennis+Pickleball+Razorpay/INR. Controls ACTIVE_SPORTS, ACTIVE_COUNTRY, CURRENCY, PAYMENT_PROVIDER
nodes.rationale: Phase-driven gating ensures data for all regions exists in MongoDB while the public API only surfaces what is live for the current market, enabling gradual geographic expansion without code deploys

nodes.label: Pricing Config
nodes.description: Canonical USD entry fees: singles=$9.99, doubles=$19.99, mixed=$19.99, mixed_doubles=$19.99. League cadence definitions: monthly(1mo), quarterly(3mo), half_yearly(6mo), yearly(12mo) with season labels

nodes.label: Rating Utils
nodes.description: ELO-style rating deltas for Tennis/Pickleball on 2.0-7.0 NTRP/DUPR scale. Staged K-factor: K=0.30 (<10 matches), K=0.15 (10-29), K=0.08 (30+). Uses conservative K of both players. Cricket ratings not handled. Clamp range 1.0-7.0

nodes.label: Round Robin Scheduler
nodes.description: Circle-method round-robin schedule generator. generate_schedule(players) returns N-1 rounds with (player_a, player_b) pairs. BYE=None for odd player counts. scoring_format_for maps sport to fast4 (tennis) or to_11 (pickleball)

nodes.label: APScheduler Setup
nodes.description: AsyncIOScheduler (UTC) wrapping three background jobs: auto_status_transitions (cron 00:05), send_match_reminders (interval 1h), auto_forfeit_stale_matches (cron 01:00)

nodes.label: Scheduler Jobs
nodes.description: Three job implementations: auto_status_transitions (upcoming->active on start_date, active->completed on end_date), send_match_reminders (email+WA for matches 23-25h out, idempotent via reminder_sent flag), auto_forfeit_stale_matches (7-day walkover for unscored matches, triggers playoff check for RR matches)

nodes.label: FastAPI Server
nodes.description: FastAPI app entry point. Mounts 16 route modules under /api prefix. Startup: seeds admin/indexes/leagues/cities/pricing/promo_codes/demo then starts APScheduler. Handles Stripe webhook inline. CORS from CORS_ORIGINS env var. MongoDB via motor AsyncIOMotorClient

nodes.label: WhatsApp Service
nodes.description: Meta Graph API v18.0 client for WhatsApp Cloud API. send_text() posts to /{phone_id}/messages. Console-log fallback when WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN/WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID unset. schedule_wa() fire-and-forget helper. verify_signature() validates X-Hub-Signature-256 webhook headers

nodes.label: User Model
nodes.description: MongoDB User document: email, name, bcrypt password_hash, role (player/admin/city_admin), sport ratings (tennis=3.0, pickleball=3.0, cricket=50.0), OTP fields, DUPR rating, gender, oauth_providers, founding_member flag

nodes.label: League Model
nodes.description: MongoDB League document: sport, format (singles/doubles/mixed/T20/T10), league_type (flex|round_robin), rr_config, division NTRP min/max, box_group_size/promote/relegate, entry_fee, currency, status lifecycle

nodes.label: Match Model
nodes.description: MongoDB Match document: player1/2 IDs and names, optional doubles partner fields (team1/2_partner), round number for RR, is_rr flag, score_data dict, status (scheduled/in_progress/completed/cancelled/walkover)

nodes.label: Standing Model
nodes.description: MongoDB Standing document with float points using formula 3W+1L+0.5(SW-SL)+0.1(GW-GL)+BP, tracking sets/games won/lost for tiebreaker resolution

nodes.label: Ladder Model
nodes.description: MongoDB Ladder document for city/sport/division ranking system. Entries list with rank, elo, challenge_cooldown_until. LadderChallenge tracks peer-to-peer rank challenges with expiry

nodes.label: notification_interests Collection
nodes.description: MongoDB collection queried by city+sport for active (non-unsubscribed) notification subscribers. Fields: email, user_id, channels (email|push), unsubscribed_at

nodes.label: push_subscriptions Collection
nodes.description: MongoDB collection storing Web Push subscription objects per user: endpoint, keys. 410 Gone responses trigger auto-cleanup

hyperedges.label: Notification Delivery Layer
hyperedges.description: All three modules collectively form the outbound notification system: notification_dispatch orchestrates capacity-milestone triggers, delegating to email_service for SMTP delivery and whatsapp_service for Meta Graph API delivery, both with console fallback in dev

hyperedges.label: League Configuration Triad
hyperedges.description: phase_config gates which sports/country are active, pricing_config defines canonical entry fees per format, and model_league stores the resulting league documents — together they control what leagues exist and at what price

hyperedges.label: Round Robin Scoring Pipeline
hyperedges.description: rr_scheduler generates the match schedule, model_match records each played match with score_data and winner, model_standing accumulates points using the formula tracked across the season
